summary: Localized Today dashboard count summaries and readiness-scale accessibility interpolation through Localizable.stringsdict while keeping domain rules and translations unchanged.
validations_passed: xcodebuild build -quiet -project owlory_xcode/Owlory.xcodeproj -scheme Owlory -configuration Debug -destination 'generic/platform=iOS Simulator' -derivedDataPath /tmp/owlory-today-plurals-build CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO

contract_status_changes.before: Today dashboard card summaries built count strings inline with English suffixes and manual singular/plural handling.
contract_status_changes.after: Train, Write, Career, and Home dashboard summaries now use `Localizable.stringsdict` keys owned by Today presentation code.
proof: xcodebuild build -quiet -project owlory_xcode/Owlory.xcodeproj -scheme Owlory -configuration Debug -destination 'generic/platform=iOS Simulator' -derivedDataPath /tmp/owlory-today-plurals-build CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO

contract_status_changes.before: The localization parity check validated `Localizable.strings` only.
contract_status_changes.after: The parity check now validates `Localizable.stringsdict` syntax, key parity across 19 locales, and Xcode variant-group packaging when plural resources exist.

residual_risks: Non-English `.stringsdict` values remain English placeholders and require translation-quality review.
Digest counts, notification copy, protocol schedule/status projection, quick-add recurrence text, and model display-name adapters remain deferred dynamic localization work.
The unsigned simulator build passed with the pre-existing TodayView onChange deprecation warning unrelated to this slice.
recommended_next_reason: Digest counts and date labels are the next dynamic formatting batch, with existing calendar-consistency rules already documented.
